description_long: This house features a modern, angular design with a prominent sloped roof and a mix of dark and light exterior wall panels. The front facade includes a wide covered porch supported by wooden posts, with large windows and a double glass entry door. The side of the house displays a striking geometric pattern in black and white, adding a contemporary artistic touch. The rear and opposite side are simpler, with black walls and symmetrically placed windows. The roof is finished with gray shingles and has an overhanging eave for weather protection. The structure sits on a concrete slab foundation, and the overall appearance is both functional and visually distinctive.
description: A modern house with a sloped shingle roof, geometric wall patterns, a covered porch, and large windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, double glass entry door, and large windows beneath a sloped shingle roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wooden posts, a single entry door, and the extended roof overhang.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring a bold geometric black and white wall pattern and minimal window openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a plain black wall and symmetrically arranged windows under the sloped roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large and small rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Double glass doors under a wide covered porch with wooden posts and a shingled overhang
